node.text:
Mothers, we see you. We see you fitting in that 10 minute walk that makes you feel slightly more human. We see the deep breaths you take to keep calm. We see you, we celebrate you.

Moms all over show up every day no matter what. So today, and every day, we salute you 🥰

Tag the mother figure in your life below and show them some love 💕

node.text:
📣 Calling all women, girls & femmes 📣

We’re cooking up something pretty big, and we want YOU to be a part of it – you, your mom, your sister, your bestie, your girlfriend, your wife, your trainer, your mentor. Head to our story to get involved 👆 We’ll meet you back here soon… 🧡

node.text:
"Dance is about standing out and owning your greatness." 

👑 @parrisgoebel has paved her own path in the world of dance. Unafraid to challenge the status quo, she knew she would grow up to be the face of dance –whatever it took 💫

Now a force to be reckoned with, Parris' story is a reminder to own the floor. Wherever you are in your journey.

node.text:
Dear Dancers 💌 

You are incredible. Strong, determined, daring & beautiful. As athlete and artist, you can change the 🌎 We are celebrating you, one story at a time, beginning with world-class dancer & choreographer @parrisgoebel 👑

Together, you are unstoppable. The floor is yours.

🤝 Parris & Nike 🤝
